'''Garryg''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]].

==Biography==
Placed in a [[Tulon's task force|detachment]] under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Beri Tulon]], Garryg was assigned to participate in the [[Massacre on Abridon]], but never got the chance as Tulon attempted to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], killing his entire squad, including Garryg.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
